# infomaniak_public_cloud_user (Data Source)

Reads a Public Cloud user (OpenStack identity) by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "infomaniak_public_cloud_user" "this" {
  public_cloud_id         = 1234
  public_cloud_project_id = 5678
  id                      = 42
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Identifier of the user.
- `public_cloud_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent Public Cloud product.
- `public_cloud_project_id` (Number) Identifier of the parent project.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation timestamp (Unix seconds).
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `open_stack_name` (String) Underlying OpenStack user name.
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status.
- `updated_at` (Number) Last update timestamp (Unix seconds).
